subject: Geography
title: Veryovkina: The Deepest Cave
description: A quick, practical guide to Veryovkina: The Deepest Cave.

hook.text: Veryovkina Cave in Georgia plunges 2,212 meters—deeper than seven Eiffel Towers stacked.

buildup.text: Reaching the bottom takes experienced cavers several days of climbing, crawling, and rappelling.

discovery.text: At the bottom, an underground river flows through passages no human had ever seen.

twist.text: The cave was only confirmed as the world's deepest in 2018—exploration is still ongoing.

climax.text: The deepest point a human can reach on land, without a drill, is at the bottom of a cave.

punchline.text: The deepest place you can walk to is two kilometers underground.
